name: All Together Now - The 100
overview: Seven has started promoting the biggest TV judging panel ever – 99 judges joining captain Ronan Keating on All Together Now. With 100 judges, a six-storey high set and Julia Zemiro as host, it doesn’t get any bigger. Headed up by singing superstar Ronan Keating, The 100 is made up of singers and industry professionals with big voices and even bigger opinions.
